title: Sian (disambiguation)
content:
'''Sian''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Sian Holt]]''', a high-end [[Private investigator|private detective]]
*'''[[Sian Tevv]]''', a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel Alliance]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Sian Jeisel]]''', a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]
*'''[[Sian Tesar]]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel Alliance]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]
*'''[[Sian Tevv/Legends|Sian Tevv]]''', a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] politician

==[[In-universe|Real world]]==
*'''[[Sian Clifford]]''', voice actress of [[GS-8]]
*'''[[Siân Phillips]]''', actor for [[Charal]] in ''[[Ewoks: The Battle for Endor]]''
